settings.title: What you want in your briefing
settings.description: Tell {name} what to surface. This steers which news makes your paper.
settings.hint: Plain language is fine: topics, regions, what to skip - whatever matters to you.

sources.title: News sources
sources.hint: The feeds your paper is built from. Remove what you don't read, or add any RSS/Atom feed URL.
sources.empty: No sources - your paper will have no news section.
sources.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like an http(s) URL.

settings.testHint: Send yourself the briefing notification now to check it reaches your phone.

onboarding.title: Set up your account

avatar.description: To change your avatar click the picture in this block and select a file from your computer to upload.

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Choose which modules appear in your sidebar. With none selected, all of them show.

brandLogo.title: Tophe logo
brandLogo.description: Show the Tophe logo across the app — browser tab icon, sign-in page, and the AI assistant icon. Turn it off for a neutral look.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.description: Used to decide when daily reminders fire and when calendar event reminders are sent.

activeSessions.description: These are all the active sessions of your account. Click the X to end a specifc session.
activeSessions.title: Active sessions

logout.title: Log out
logout.description: End your session on this device.

passkeys.description: Use passkeys as a secure alternative to passwords.

setPassword.description: You have not set a password yet. To set one, you need to go through the password reset flow. Click the button below to send an email to reset your password and follow the instructions in the email.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.description: Connect outside calendars and services to Tophe. All data stays on your server.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Choose how you receive notifications. Disabled options are stored; everything is enabled by default.

test.title: Send a test notification
test.description: Fires a notification to yourself so you can verify the bell, the sound, and the email template. Respects your preferences below - if you've disabled in-app or email for app updates, that path will be skipped.
test.error: Could not send the test. Please try again.

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: A private space to capture your thoughts.

empty.title: Your journal is empty
empty.description: Write your first entry to get started. Only you can see what you write here.

new.subtitle: Write down whatever's on your mind.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this entry?
deleteConfirm.message: This entry will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

filters.emptyHint: Try widening the range or clearing filters.

summary.description: Let {name} read your recent entries and reflect back themes, moods, and moments that stood out. Your entries never leave your database except for this summary call.

calendar.subtitle: Plan your days, weeks, and routines in one place.

agenda.emptyHint: Add an event to start filling in your week.

form.title: Title
form.allDayHint: Spans the full day without a specific time.

managed.bannerTitle: This event is synced from Outlook
managed.bannerHint: Edits are read-only here. Change it in Outlook and it'll update on the next sync.

outlook.title: Outlook calendar
outlook.description: Subscribe to a published Outlook calendar. Events are read-only and refresh on a schedule.
outlook.urlHint: In Outlook Web → Calendar → Settings → Shared calendars → Publish a calendar. Choose 'Can view titles and locations' and copy the ICS link.
outlook.keyNote: We store the URL encrypted. Rotating CALENDAR_INTEGRATION_SECRET will invalidate the saved URL - you'd need to reconnect.

insights.subtitle: A grounded read on your history, with suggested next steps.
insights.empty: Generate insights to get a read on your trajectory and next moves.
insights.error: Couldn't generate insights. Please try again.

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Track the things you're working toward, not just what's on your plate.

empty.title: No goals yet
empty.description: A goal is something you make progress toward - not a one-off task. Start with something measurable.

NUMERIC.label: Numeric
NUMERIC.description: Count toward a target (e.g. 30 books, 100 km).

BOOLEAN.label: Yes / no
BOOLEAN.description: A single outcome - done or not done.

MILESTONE.label: Milestones
MILESTONE.description: Break the goal into checkpoints you tick off.

LONG_TERM.label: Long-term
LONG_TERM.description: A vision or multi-year ambition. No fixed end date.

PROJECT.label: Project
PROJECT.description: A finite effort with a clear end. Often broken into milestones.

HABIT.label: Habit
HABIT.description: A short, recurring sprint. Tracks consistency, not finality.

card.logHint: Add a quick update toward your target.

new.title: New goal
new.subtitle: Define what you want to achieve and how you'll know you're there.

edit.title: Edit goal
edit.subtitle: Update the details of your goal.

form.title: Title
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Why does this matter? What counts as progress?
form.cadenceHint: Get a nudge to check in. Fires in your local timezone.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete goal?
deleteConfirm.message: This will permanently delete the goal, its milestones, and its check-in history.

notifications.checkInError: Couldn't log that. Please try again.

notes.title: Notes
